items.title: Thirteen killed in Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon, health ministry says
items.dek: Four women and a child are among the dead, as fighting between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah continues despite a ceasefire.
items.body: Four women and a child are among the dead, as fighting between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah continues despite a ceasefire.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Spirit Airlines shutting down after rescue talks collapse
items.dek: The airline had been in talks with the Trump administration about a $500m bailout.
items.body: The airline had been in talks with the Trump administration about a $500m bailout.
